rewrite.text:
PROVE ex1: ∀n. n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : ℕ

  GOAL: n + 0 = n

  INDUCTION n

  PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
    SIMPLIFY LHS:
      0 + 0
      = 0    [BY add_base]

    THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0

    CONCLUDE: Base case holds [QED]

  PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S n'
    ASSUME n' : ℕ
    INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: n' + 0 = n'

    SIMPLIFY LHS:
      S n' + 0
      = S (n' + 0)    [BY add_succ]

    FACT h1: S (n' + 0) = S n' [BY ih]

    THEREFORE S n' + 0 = S n'

    CONCLUDE: Inductive case holds [QED]

  CONCLUDE: By induction, ∀n. n + 0 = n [QED]
END
